name: Complia Cannabis Compliance Management API
what_it_does: Complia cannabis compliance management REST API for state cannabis regulatory reporting, METRC integration, and cannabis license management for dispensaries, cultivators, manufacturers, and distributors. Enables AI agents to manage METRC tag creation and plant tracking for seed-to-sale compliance automation, handle state cannabis regulatory report generation and submission for compliance reporting automation, access inventory reconciliation and manifest management for cannabis supply chain compliance automation, retrieve cannabis license status and renewal tracking for license management automation, manage laboratory test result integration and COA management for product compliance automation, handle transfer and transport manifest generation for cannabis distribution compliance, access employee cannabis work permit and badging tracking for workforce compliance automation, retrieve sales and excise tax calculation for cannabis tax compliance automation, manage multi-state license portfolio for cannabis multi-state operator compliance, and integrate Complia with cannabis POS systems, BioTrack, MJ Freeway, and state track-and-trace platforms for end-to-end cannabis compliance lifecycle.
use_cases: Reporting to METRC from seed-to-sale compliance agents
Generating transfer manifests from distribution compliance agents
Tracking licenses from cannabis MSO management agents
Calculating cannabis taxes from excise compliance agents
not_for: Cannabis POS and retail transaction processing (use Dutchie or Flowhub)
Cannabis financial services and banking (use Safe Harbor Financial)
best_when: A licensed cannabis operator (dispensary, cultivator, manufacturer, distributor), cannabis multi-state operator (MSO), or cannabis compliance team wanting AI agents to automate METRC reporting, state regulatory compliance, manifest management, and license tracking.
avoid_when: METRC API KEY STATE-SPECIFIC SCOPE: Automated METRC reporting via Complia requires state-specific METRC API keys and facility licenses; automated cross-state reporting with incorrect facility-state key pairing creates METRC API rejection and compliance reporting failure; implement state-facility API key mapping before multi-state compliance automation. CANNABIS INVENTORY RECONCILIATION TOLERANCE: Automated cannabis inventory reconciliation via Complia must apply state-specific weight tolerance thresholds for seed-to-sale discrepancy; automated reconciliation reporting with discrepancies exceeding state tolerance without human review creates state cannabis regulator audit trigger. TRANSPORT MANIFEST TIMING REQUIREMENTS: Automated cannabis transport manifest generation via Complia must comply with state-specific manifest timing requirements (manifest required before departure, not after); automated manifest generation initiated after transport departure creates cannabis transportation compliance violation.

auth.notes: Complia uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Cannabis compliance software for licensed cannabis operators. METRC integration for state track-and-trace reporting. Multi-state cannabis compliance across 40+ METRC and BioTrack states. Used by cannabis dispensaries, cultivators, manufacturers, and MSOs (multi-state operators). State regulatory report generation and submission. Competes with BioTrack, MJ Platform, and COVA for cannabis compliance software.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription per licensed cannabis facility
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per facility; multi-facility and MSO volume pricing; compliance reporting and METRC integration included
pricing.notes: Cannabis compliance software. Annual subscription per licensed facility. MSO volume pricing for multi-state operators. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; METRC reporting and inventory queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: METRC STATE-SPECIFIC API KEY AND FACILITY MAPPING: Automated METRC compliance reporting via Complia requires facility-level METRC API key scoped to specific state license; automated reporting must map each cannabis facility to its correct state METRC API key; cross-facility or cross-state key reuse creates METRC authentication failure and unreported compliance events

NO WEBHOOKS — COMPLIANCE EVENT REQUIRES POLLING: Complia does not support webhooks; automated compliance monitoring for METRC submission failures, manifest discrepancies, and license renewal alerts requires scheduled polling; implement polling interval aligned with state reporting deadlines (end-of-day METRC reconciliation, manifest pre-departure timing)

INVENTORY TOLERANCE VARIANCE BEFORE STATE SUBMISSION: Automated cannabis inventory reconciliation reports must apply state-specific weight tolerance thresholds before METRC submission; automated submission of reconciliation reports with weight discrepancies exceeding state tolerance without human review flags cannabis operator account for regulator investigation

TRANSPORT MANIFEST PRE-DEPARTURE REQUIREMENT: Automated transport manifest creation via Complia must be completed and METRC-submitted before physical cannabis product leaves licensed premises; automated manifest generation triggered on departure scan rather than pre-departure creates cannabis transportation compliance violation in all METRC states

CANNABIS TAX RATE STATE AND MUNICIPALITY VARIATION: Automated cannabis excise tax calculation via Complia must apply current state, county, and municipality-specific cannabis tax rates; cannabis tax rates change annually and vary by product type (flower, concentrate, edible, medical vs adult-use); automated tax calculation using cached rates without validation creates cannabis tax compliance exposure

API KEY NO SCOPE GRANULARITY: Complia API key authentication has no scope controls; all API key access is full account access including inventory adjustment and compliance report deletion; implement dedicated read-only integration account for automated compliance monitoring agents
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cannabis compliance. SOC2. API key. US. Cannabis inventory, seed-to-sale track-and-trace, and state regulatory reporting data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cannabis compliance. SOC2. API key. US. Cannabis inventory, regulatory reporting, and license data.
